) AS [c1]

Executing controller action with signature System.Threading.Tasks.Task`1[Microsoft.AspNetCore.Mvc.ActionResult`1[System.Collections.Generic.List`1[ApiProject.DTO.SalesDto+GiftResume]]] GetGiftResumes() on controller ApiProject.Controllers.SalesController (ApiProject).
2026-02-10 17:28:55.244 +02:00 [INF] Executed DbCommand (39ms) [Parameters=[], CommandType='"Text"', CommandTimeout='30']
SELECT [c].[GiftModelId] AS [GiftId], [g].[Name] AS [GiftName], [g].[TicketPrice] AS [GiftPrice], COALESCE(SUM([c].[Quantity]), 0) AS [TotalTicketsPurchase], (
    SELECT COALESCE(SUM([c1].[Quantity] * [g1].[TicketPrice]), 0)
    FROM [cartItems] AS [c1]
    INNER JOIN [carts] AS [c2] ON [c1].[CartId] = [c2].[Id]
    INNER JOIN [gifts] AS [g0] ON [c1].[GiftModelId] = [g0].[Id]
    INNER JOIN [gifts] AS [g1] ON [c1].[GiftModelId] = [g1].[Id]
    WHERE [c2].[MyStatus] = 1 AND [c].[GiftModelId] = [c1].[GiftModelId] AND ([g].[Name] = [g0].[Name] OR ([g].[Name] IS NULL AND [g0].[Name] IS NULL)) AND [g].[TicketPrice] = [g0].[TicketPrice]) AS [TotalIncome]
FROM [cartItems] AS [c]
INNER JOIN [carts] AS [c0] ON [c].[CartId] = [c0].[Id]
INNER JOIN [gifts] AS [g] ON [c].[GiftModelId] = [g].[Id]
WHERE [c0].[MyStatus] = 1
GROUP BY [c].[GiftModelId], [g].[Name], [g].[TicketPrice]

SELECT [c1].[Id], [c1].[MyStatus], [c1].[UserModelId], [s].[Id], [s].[CartId], [s].[GiftModelId], [s].[Quantity], [s].[Id0], [s].[CategoryModelId], [s].[Description], [s].[DonorModelId], [s].[Image], [s].[Name], [s].[TicketPrice], [s].[UserModelId], [s].[isRaffleDone]
FROM (

    FROM [carts] AS [c]
    WHERE [c].[UserModelId] = @__userId_0 AND [c].[MyStatus] = 0
) AS [c1]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [c0].[Id], [c0].[CartId], [c0].[GiftModelId], [c0].[Quantity], [g].[Id] AS [Id0], [g].[CategoryModelId], [g].[Description], [g].[DonorModelId], [g].[Image], [g].[Name], [g].[TicketPrice], [g].[UserModelId], [g].[isRaffleDone]
    FROM [cartItems] AS [c0]
    INNER JOIN [gifts] AS [g] ON [c0].[GiftModelId] = [g].[Id]
) AS [s] ON [c1].[Id] = [s].[CartId]
ORDER BY [c1].[Id], [s].[Id]

SELECT [c1].[Id], [c1].[MyStatus], [c1].[UserModelId], [s].[Id], [s].[CartId], [s].[GiftModelId], [s].[Quantity], [s].[Id0], [s].[CategoryModelId], [s].[Description], [s].[DonorModelId], [s].[Image], [s].[Name], [s].[TicketPrice], [s].[UserModelId], [s].[isRaffleDone]

    FROM [carts] AS [c]
    WHERE [c].[UserModelId] = @__userId_0 AND [c].[MyStatus] = 0
) AS [c1]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [c0].[Id], [c0].[CartId], [c0].[GiftModelId], [c0].[Quantity], [g].[Id] AS [Id0], [g].[CategoryModelId], [g].[Description], [g].[DonorModelId], [g].[Image], [g].[Name], [g].[TicketPrice], [g].[UserModelId], [g].[isRaffleDone]
    FROM [cartItems] AS [c0]
    INNER JOIN [gifts] AS [g] ON [c0].[GiftModelId] = [g].[Id]
) AS [s] ON [c1].[Id] = [s].[CartId]
ORDER BY [c1].[Id], [s].[Id]

SELECT [c].[GiftModelId] AS [GiftId], [g].[Name] AS [GiftName], [g].[TicketPrice] AS [GiftPrice], COALESCE(SUM([c].[Quantity]), 0) AS [TotalTicketsPurchase], (
    SELECT COALESCE(SUM([c1].[Quantity] * [g1].[TicketPrice]), 0)
    FROM [cartItems] AS [c1]
    INNER JOIN [carts] AS [c2] ON [c1].[CartId] = [c2].[Id]
    INNER JOIN [gifts] AS [g0] ON [c1].[GiftModelId] = [g0].[Id]
    INNER JOIN [gifts] AS [g1] ON [c1].[GiftModelId] = [g1].[Id]
    WHERE [c2].[MyStatus] = 1 AND [c].[GiftModelId] = [c1].[GiftModelId] AND ([g].[Name] = [g0].[Name] OR ([g].[Name] IS NULL AND [g0].[Name] IS NULL)) AND [g].[TicketPrice] = [g0].[TicketPrice]) AS [TotalIncome]
FROM [cartItems] AS [c]
INNER JOIN [carts] AS [c0] ON [c].[CartId] = [c0].[Id]
INNER JOIN [gifts] AS [g] ON [c].[GiftModelId] = [g].[Id]
WHERE [c0].[MyStatus] = 1
GROUP BY [c].[GiftModelId], [g].[Name], [g].[TicketPrice]

Executing controller action with signature System.Threading.Tasks.Task`1[Microsoft.AspNetCore.Mvc.ActionResult`1[System.Collections.Generic.List`1[ApiProject.DTO.SalesDto+GiftResume]]] GetGiftResumes() on controller ApiProject.Controllers.SalesController (ApiProject).
2026-02-10 18:51:51.319 +02:00 [INF] Executed DbCommand (43ms) [Parameters=[], CommandType='"Text"', CommandTimeout='30']
SELECT [c].[GiftModelId] AS [GiftId], [g].[Name] AS [GiftName], [g].[TicketPrice] AS [GiftPrice], COALESCE(SUM([c].[Quantity]), 0) AS [TotalTicketsPurchase], (
    SELECT COALESCE(SUM([c1].[Quantity] * [g1].[TicketPrice]), 0)
    FROM [cartItems] AS [c1]
    INNER JOIN [carts] AS [c2] ON [c1].[CartId] = [c2].[Id]
    INNER JOIN [gifts] AS [g0] ON [c1].[GiftModelId] = [g0].[Id]
    INNER JOIN [gifts] AS [g1] ON [c1].[GiftModelId] = [g1].[Id]
    WHERE [c2].[MyStatus] = 1 AND [c].[GiftModelId] = [c1].[GiftModelId] AND ([g].[Name] = [g0].[Name] OR ([g].[Name] IS NULL AND [g0].[Name] IS NULL)) AND [g].[TicketPrice] = [g0].[TicketPrice]) AS [TotalIncome]
FROM [cartItems] AS [c]
INNER JOIN [carts] AS [c0] ON [c].[CartId] = [c0].[Id]
INNER JOIN [gifts] AS [g] ON [c].[GiftModelId] = [g].[Id]
WHERE [c0].[MyStatus] = 1
GROUP BY [c].[GiftModelId], [g].[Name], [g].[TicketPrice]

    FROM [carts] AS [c]
    WHERE [c].[UserModelId] = @__userId_0 AND [c].[MyStatus] = 0
) AS [c1]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [c0].[Id], [c0].[CartId], [c0].[GiftModelId], [c0].[Quantity], [g].[Id] AS [Id0], [g].[CategoryModelId], [g].[Description], [g].[DonorModelId], [g].[Image], [g].[Name], [g].[TicketPrice], [g].[UserModelId], [g].[isRaffleDone]
    FROM [cartItems] AS [c0]
    INNER JOIN [gifts] AS [g] ON [c0].[GiftModelId] = [g].[Id]
) AS [s] ON [c1].[Id] = [s].[CartId]
ORDER BY [c1].[Id], [s].[Id]

) AS [s] ON [d].[Id] = [s].[DonorModelId]
ORDER BY [d].[Id], [s].[Id]

SELECT [d].[Id], [d].[Email], [d].[FirstName], [d].[LastName], [d].[Phone], [s].[Id], [s].[CategoryModelId], [s].[Description], [s].[DonorModelId], [s].[Image], [s].[Name], [s].[TicketPrice], [s].[UserModelId], [s].[isRaffleDone], [s].[Id0], [s].[Name0]
FROM [donors] AS [d]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [g].[Id], [g].[CategoryModelId], [g].[Description], [g].[DonorModelId], [g].[Image], [g].[Name], [g].[TicketPrice], [g].[UserModelId], [g].[isRaffleDone], [c].[Id] AS [Id0], [c].[Name] AS [Name0]
    FROM [gifts] AS [g]
    INNER JOIN [categories] AS [c] ON [g].[CategoryModelId] = [c].[Id]
